beginnerProjects.name: iFixAi
beginnerProjects.description: Catch your AI's mistakes and blind spots before your customers or regulators do. iFixAi runs 45 inspections, 32 graded core plus 13 extended for frontier risks like sabotage, sandbagging, and oversight evasion. It returns a letter grade in under 5 minutes. Industry and model agnostic.
beginnerProjects.descriptionZh: Catch your AI's mistakes and blind spots before your customers or regulators do. iFixAi runs 45 inspections, 32 graded core plus 13 extended for frontier risks like sabotage, sandbagging, and oversight evasion. It returns a letter grade in under 5 minutes. Industry and model agnostic.

beginnerProjects.name: LAP
beginnerProjects.description: Your agents are guessing at APIs. Give them the actual Agent-Native spec. 1500+ API's Ready To-Use skills,  Compile any API spec into a lean, agent-native format. 10× smaller. OpenAPI, GraphQL, AsyncAPI, Protobuf, Postman.
